div.p: Implementation Spec: Fragment Offset (13-bit) is measured in 8-byte units.

ol.li: 8-Byte Alignment: Every fragment (except the last) MUST have a length that is a multiple of 8 bytes.
Overlapping: If Fragment B overlaps Fragment A, the implementation must resolve (standard: favor later data or discard).
Total Size: Reassembled size must not exceed 65,535 bytes (IP max).
